title: Auction of State Government Securities
description: The following State Governments have offered to sell stock by way of auction, for an aggregate amount of ₹11,500 Crore (Face Value). Sr. No. State Amount to be raised (₹ Crore) Tenor (Year) Type of Auction 1. Maharashtra 1600 08 Yield 1600 18 Yield 800 28 Yield 2. Punjab 1300 12 Yield 3. Rajasthan 1200 10 Yield 1000 Re-issue of 7.99% Rajasthan SGS 2041, issued on March 30, 2026 Price 1000 23 Yield 4. Telangana 1000 07 Yield 1000 11 Yield 1000 21 Yield   Total 11500
